zh.lifeSummary: 當Janneken Pieters於大約1625年出生在荷蘭藍德福利辛根時，她的父親Henri Pieters32歲，母親Elisabeth Gilde20歲。她於1644年5月29日與Jan Corneliszen Losee在荷蘭藍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1688年6月23日之後在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯布盧可林，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯布申維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janneken Pieters于大约1625年出生在荷兰藍德福利辛根时，她的父亲Henri Pieters32岁，母亲Elisabeth Gilde20岁。她于1644年5月29日与Jan Corneliszen Losee在荷兰藍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1688年6月23日之后在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯布盧可林，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯布申維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Pieters
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Raymonde, Laurent, Marcel, Pierre, Serge.  Dutch Bernardus, Wim, Bram, Pieter, Willem.
Dutch and Flemish: patronymic from the personal name Pieter (see Peter ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: Janneken
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Horst, Ralf.
North German: patronymic from Hanneke, a pet form of Hans .

historicEvents.description: Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.
After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York
Historical Boundaries 1683: Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Kings, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Janneken Pieters was born about 1625, in Vlissingen, Zeeland, Netherlands, her father, Henri Pieters, was 32 and her mother, Elisabeth Gilde, was 20. She married Jan Corneliszen Losee on 29 May 1644, in Zeeland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 23 June 1688, in Brooklyn, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janneken Pieters est née environ 1625, à Vlissingen, Zélande, Pays-Bas, son père, Henri Pieters, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Gilde, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Jan Corneliszen Losee le 29 mai 1644, à Zélande, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 23 juin 1688, à Brooklyn, Kings, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janneken Pieters um 1625 in Vlissingen, Seeland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri Pieters 32 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth Gilde 20. Sie hat am 29. Mai 1644 in Seeland, Niederlande Jan Corneliszen Losee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 23. Juni 1688 in Brooklyn, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janneken Pieters è nata il circa 1625 nel Vlissingen, Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Henri Pieters, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth Gilde, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Jan Corneliszen Losee il 29 maggio 1644, nel Zelanda, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 23 giugno 1688, nel Brooklyn, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Janneken Pietersが約1625年にオランダゼエランドvリシンジェンで生まれた時，父Henri Pietersは32歳，母Elisabeth Gildeは20歳であった。1644年5月29日にオランダゼエランドでJan Corneliszen Loseeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1688年6月23日以後にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーキングズブルークリンで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーキングズブシュウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janneken Pieters(이)가 대략 1625년 네덜란드 제랜드 블리징에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri Pieters(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth Gilde(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1644년 5월 29일 네덜란드 제랜드에서 Jan Corneliszen Losee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1688년 6월 23일 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 브루클린에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 부슈윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janneken Pieters nasceu aproximadamente 1625, em Vlissingen, Zelandia, Países Baixos, seu pai, Henri Pieters, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Gilde, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan Corneliszen Losee em 29 de maio de 1644, em Zelandia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 23 de junho de 1688, em Brooklyn, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janneken Pieters родилась около 1625 г. в местности влиссинген, зиланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Henri Pieters было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Gilde, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan Corneliszen Losee 29 мая 1644 г. в местности зиланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 23 июнь 1688 г. в местности бруклин, кингс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности бушвикк, кингс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janneken Pieters nació aproximadamente 1625, en Vlissingen, Zeeland, Países Bajos, su papá, Henri Pieters, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Gilde, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jan Corneliszen Losee el 29 de mayo de 1644, en Zeeland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 23 de junio de 1688, en Brooklyn, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.
